channel.title: thoughts on Jayesh Nair
channel.description: Recent content in thoughts on Jayesh Nair

item.title: An Ode to the Internet
item.description: I. On August 15, 1995, Indians woke up to the tariff plan of a new sort of communication service. They could buy dial-up internet. At Rs 15,000 a year, it was not quite something the average Indian could afford then. I was still a young kid when I had a glimpse of the Internet1. The old dial-up connection tones, the slow speeds and hefty charges levied. But I was part of the generation that grew up with it’s evolving use cases.
